headline: Baker Hughes CEO Lorenzo Simonelli: We're in an energy demand decade
summary: CNBC’s Brian Sullivan and Baker Hughes CEO Lorenzo Simonelli join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the impact of the Iran war on gasoline prices, state of energy demand, growth outlook, and more.

headline: Baker Hughes Undergoes an AI Makeover
summary: The company said this year that it is on track to double its data center-related orders to $3 billion in the three years through 2027.
